Footer.brand: Backend Developer specialized in end-to-end systems with Java, Go and Rust — robust, scalable and maintainable solutions.

Home.metaDescription: Backend developer with 20+ years in tech: from IT support and farming to building end-to-end systems with Java, Go and Rust.
Home.ogDescription: Backend developer with 20+ years in tech. End-to-end systems with Java, Go and Rust.
Home.heroDescription: I build backend systems in Java, Go and Rust — from industrial platforms running predictive ML on edge hardware to AI-powered dev tools that write and review code. 20+ years in tech.
Home.aboutSubtitle: I build software that holds up in production
Home.journeyP1: I've spent 20+ years around technology. It started in IT support and hardware maintenance — which taught me how systems really work under the hood. Then came several years running a farm, where a bad call costs you a season, not a rollback.
Home.journeyP2: That mix of hands-on experience is what pulled me back into software. Now I build systems end to end in Java, Go and Rust — I own the whole stack, from the database to the deploy — and I'm always picking up something new.
Home.apigenCaption: apigen — a tool I built that turns a SQL schema into a complete, running Spring Boot API.

About.metaDescription: More about my experience, skills and the projects I build: backend, frontend, edge ML and AI tooling.
About.heroSubtitle: I build systems end to end — from data to deploy: backend, frontend and ML on the edge
About.storyP1: Hi, I'm Javier — a Software Development Technician (Universidad Gastón Dachary, 2025) working out of Córdoba, Argentina. My path into tech started 20+ years ago in IT support and hardware maintenance; later I spent several years running a farm, where a bad call costs you a season, not a rollback.
About.storyP2: Over the past year I've focused on building complete, end-to-end projects: backends in Java/Spring, Go and Rust; React frontends; ML pipelines with inference at the edge; and developer tooling — multi-agent AI code review, starter templates for new projects, and automated setup for fresh dev machines. Every project pushes me into a new stack.
About.work1: Understand the problem before writing code. I take the time to read, discuss and map out what I'm solving before the first line.
About.work2: Technical decisions with the tradeoff spelled out. Every choice has a cost; I pick deliberately and can explain why.
About.area2: Frontend: React, Next.js, Vite, Mantine, Zustand, Zod, React Flow
About.area3: Industrial edge: Modbus TCP/RTU, MQTT, local ML inference with ONNX
About.area4: ML pipelines: training in Python, inference in Rust with parity tests, SHAP for explainability
About.area5: AI tooling: MCP servers, multi-agent systems, SAST/SCA integration (Semgrep, Trivy, Gitleaks)
About.edu2Degree: ONE Tech Foundation G8 — Data Science, ETL & ML
